what-is-an-agent.instruction: Define the 4 properties that make an 'agent': autonomy, tool use, reasoning, persistence. One-sentence example for each.
what-is-an-agent.successMessage: Four properties, four sentences. Clearest agent definition.

agent-anatomy.instruction: Describe agent internals: brain (LLM), hands (tools), memory (context), conscience (guardrails). How do they interact?
agent-anatomy.successMessage: The anatomy metaphor makes agents concrete and buildable.

orchestration-patterns.instruction: Compare 3 orchestration patterns: sequential pipeline, parallel fan-out, router. Diagram in words, use case, failure mode.
orchestration-patterns.placeholder: Pattern 1: Sequential — A then B then C...
orchestration-patterns.successMessage: Orchestration patterns are multi-agent system blueprints.

agent-communication.instruction: Design an inter-agent message format: sender, receiver, type (request/response/event), payload, priority.
agent-communication.successMessage: Structured communication is the foundation of reliable multi-agent systems.

memory-systems.instruction: Design 3-tier memory: working (current task), episodic (past interactions), semantic (learned knowledge). How do they interact?
memory-systems.successMessage: Three-tier memory builds agents that genuinely learn.

cron-and-scheduling.instruction: Design 3 scheduled agent tasks: hourly, daily, weekly. What the agent does, checks, and what triggers an alert.
cron-and-scheduling.successMessage: Scheduled agents work while everyone sleeps.

monitoring-and-healing.instruction: Design self-healing for agents. If one fails: how detected, recovery steps, when to escalate to human.
monitoring-and-healing.successMessage: Self-healing agents — the holy grail of autonomous systems.

conflict-resolution.instruction: Agent A wants to send a promo email; Agent B says customer is at churn risk. Design the resolution protocol.

the-conscience-layer.instruction: Design a 'conscience layer': rules never broken, actions needing human approval, handling ethical edge cases.
the-conscience-layer.successMessage: The conscience layer makes autonomous AI trustworthy.

build-a-team.instruction: Design a team of 3-5 specialized agents for a business. Each: role, tools, communication with others, what it owns.
build-a-team.successMessage: You just designed an AI workforce.
